description_long: This is a large delivery truck with a white cab and a rectangular cargo box. The sides of the cargo box feature a colorful mural with the words 'BADLANDS DISTRIBUTION' and images of parcels, suggesting it is used for logistics or package delivery. The front of the truck displays a prominent black 'B' on the hood, and the rear doors also feature a large 'B' over a background of packages. The truck has two visible axles, with black wheels and a standard day cab configuration. The exterior appears to be primarily metal with some plastic and glass components, and the truck is designed for urban and commercial environments.
description: A white delivery truck with 'BADLANDS DISTRIBUTION' graphics and a large cargo box, featuring a bold 'B' on the front and rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white cab, windshield, grille, and a large black 'B' on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'BADLANDS DISTRIBUTION' mural, two black wheels, and the full length of the cargo box.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cargo doors with a large 'B' and images of parcels.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the same mural and truck features visible.
